'''Oran''' was the chief communications officer onboard the ''[[Adamantine]]'' when it was infected by the [[Death Seed]] plague in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] and as a result, she died.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
